ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "media" TEXT /* Media source of the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author(s) of the article */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher of the article */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the article */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the article */,
  "read_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Estimated time to read the article */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is featured */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the topic is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_parent_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the source */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the source's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the source */,
  "is_reliable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the source is considered reliable */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the source (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_topics" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "relevance_score" INTEGER /* Relevance score of the topic to the article (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, administrator) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the article was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the article */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the article (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research paper */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the research paper */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the research paper was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the research paper */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author(s) of the research paper */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher of the research paper */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the research paper */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the research paper */,
  "read_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Estimated time to read the research paper */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the research paper has been cited */,
  "is_peer_reviewed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the research paper is peer-reviewed */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the research paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_topics" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research paper */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "relevance_score" INTEGER /* Relevance score of the topic to the research paper (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_topics" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "interest_level" INTEGER /* Interest level of the user in the topic (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "topic_id")
)
